name: Skill Optimizer
description: Auto-improve any Claude skill through iterative test-score-refine loops with a live dashboard.
longDescription:
Runs autonomous improvement loops on any skill's `SKILL.md`. Builds a frozen evaluation harness with **anchored 1-5 rubrics** across skill-specific quality dimensions, then loops up to **15 rounds**: execute the skill against test inputs, score output against the harness, make one targeted change, re-score, keep if improved or revert if not.

Harness is validated and reused across runs when the skill hasn't changed. Includes a self-contained `dashboard.html` with score-over-time chart, per-criterion breakdown, and kept/reverted changelog. Converges automatically at **90%+** on 3 consecutive rounds. Plateau strategy switches approaches (rules → examples → restructuring) after 3 non-improving rounds.
